issues.description: Several checkout presentation components lack test coverage: DisplayBlockRenderer.tsx, ImageBlock.tsx, DynamicFormField.tsx, DisplayBlocksSection.tsx, FormFieldsSection.tsx, BuyerField.tsx. These are user-facing UI components that handle form fields and display blocks for the checkout flow.
issues.fix: Add unit tests for these components. Priority: BuyerField.tsx (form input), DynamicFormField.tsx (dynamic rendering logic).

issues.description: The test 'handleCreate calls createMutation with sellerId' verifies the call with { sellerId: SELLER_ID, nameEn: '' } but does not test onError handling. The handleCreate callback only handles onSuccess (expanding the new method). A test verifying behavior on mutation failure would improve coverage.
issues.fix: Add a test case for handleCreate when the mutation fails (mockCreateMutate.mockImplementationOnce calls onError callback).

patterns.description: TEST-001 fix verified: usePaymentMethodsManager.test.tsx is comprehensive with 13 test cases covering: return values, initial state, toggle expand, collapse on different expand, create with sellerId, create expands new method, delete on confirm, delete on cancel, delete collapses expanded, toggle active, moveUp swap, moveUp noop at top, moveDown swap, moveDown noop at bottom. Excellent coverage.
patterns.verdict: CLEAN - TEST-001 fix verified and comprehensive

patterns.description: TEST-003 fix verified: getInitials.test.ts covers 7 edge cases: multi-word name, 3+ words, single word, lowercase, null name with email, uppercase email initial, null name with empty email. Comprehensive coverage.
patterns.verdict: CLEAN - TEST-003 fix verified and comprehensive

patterns.description: InlineTagEditor.test.tsx correctly tests isInputVisible behavior after the NAME-003 rename. Test at line 'shows add button initially (input hidden)' verifies input is not shown, and 'shows input when add button is clicked' verifies it appears after click.
useAddToCart.test.ts uses the renamed isAdded from NAME-002 fix - the test file correctly references isAdded throughout.
